calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-10-2018 Off Calendar

Application For Quiet Title Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-04-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Quiet Title Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Gail Dekreon; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Daniel S. Maroon, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Housing Authority of the City and County of San Francisco.
Witness Jackie Luk sworn.
No other appearances.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court GRANTS Judgment Quieting Title as follows:
The Housing Authority owns real property located at 838 Pacific Avenue, San Francisco, California, 94133: Parcel One, Parcel Two, Parcel Three, and Parcel Five.
The Housing Authority is the owner in fee simple of Parcels One, Two, Three and Five as described in the Judgment.

Order signed in open court.

Application For Quiet Title Prove-Up Hearing
